description.value: > Demon Associated Domains: Chaos, Evil. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the touch of chaos power of the Chaos domain or the touch of evil power of the Evil domain. Demons are a race of chaotic evil outsiders. Fury of the Abyss (Su): As a swift action, you can give yourself an enhancement bonus equal to 1/2 your cleric level (minimum +1) on melee attacks, melee damage rolls, and combat maneuver checks. This bonus lasts for 1 round. During this round, you take a â2 penalty to AC. You can use this ability for a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier. Replacement Domain Spells: 1stâ doom, 3rdâ rage, 6thâ planar binding ( demons only).
